summary: Harden WTS control-plane outbox lookup performance after review.
rationale: The Workbench runtime projection reads WTS outbox rows by event type and aggregate identity. This narrow red-zone follow-up adds the missing index to keep review-discovered production lookup paths bounded without changing payload shape or workflow behavior.
deletion_targets: full outbox scans for workflow aggregate projection reads
risks: The migration must stay idempotent for existing local SQLite databases.
The new index must match the Workbench projection lookup shape without creating a second schema authority.
